zh.lifeSummary: 當Emmeline Heron於1289年10月出生在英國越可爾希爾可斯同時，她的父親Walter Heron20歲，母親Cristiana De NOTTON33歲。她於1315年之前與Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1323年9月6日在英國林可爾史爾可乃斯享年33歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emmeline Heron于1289年10月出生在英国越可爾希爾可斯同时，她的父亲Walter Heron20岁，母亲Cristiana De NOTTON33岁。她于1315年之前与Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1323年9月6日在英国林可爾史爾可乃斯享年33岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Heron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Herron  .
French (Héron): nickname for a tall, thin person, thought to resemble a heron (Old French hairon).

variants.name: Herron
meanings: English: habitational name from Harome (North Yorkshire), from Old English (æt thǣm) hārum ‘at the (gray) stones’, dative plural of hār ‘gray, stone’.

English and Scottish: nickname probably for a tall, thin man with long legs, from Old French hairon ‘heron’, Anglo-Norman French heron, Middle English heiroun, heyron, herne, heron. Compare Hearn and Heron .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from (Le) Héron in France (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Emmeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. In origin it seems to have been a derivative of   Emma  , but when it was revived in the 19th century there was some confusion with   Emily .  It was born by the suffragette  Emmeline Pankhurst  (  1858–1928 ), mother of  Christabel  and  Sylvia .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Emmeline Heron was born in October 1289, in Silkstone, Yorkshire, England, her father, Walter Heron, was 20 and her mother, Cristiana De NOTTON, was 33. She married Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I before 1315, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 6 September 1323, in Knaith, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emmeline Heron est née en octobre 1289, à Silkstone, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Walter Heron, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Cristiana De NOTTON, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I avant 1315, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 6 septembre 1323, à Knaith, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emmeline Heron im Oktober 1289 in Silkstone, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Heron 20 und ihre Mutter Cristiana De NOTTON 33. Sie hat vor 1315 in England Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 6. September 1323 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Knaith, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emmeline Heron è nata il nel ottobre 1289 nel Silkstone, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Walter Heron, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Cristiana De NOTTON, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I prima del 1315, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 6 settembre 1323, nel Knaith, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Emmeline Heronが1289年10月にイギリスヨークシュアイアシルクストーンで生まれた時，父Walter Heronは20歳，母Cristiana De NOTTONは33歳であった。1315年以前にイギリスでLord John Le Neveu Darcy Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1323年9月6日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアナイスで33歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Emmeline Heron(이)가 1289년 10월 영국 요르크실르 시크스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Heron(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cristiana De NOTTON(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1315년 이전 영국에서 Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1323년 9월 6일 영국 링코실르 나이스에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emmeline Heron nasceu em outubro de 1289, em Silkstone, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Heron, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Cristiana De NOTTON, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I antes 1315, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 6 de setembro de 1323, em Knaith, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emmeline Heron родилась октябрь 1289 г. в местности силкстоун, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter Heron было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Cristiana De NOTTON, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I перед 1315 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 6 сентября 1323 г. в местности неит, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emmeline Heron nació en octubre de 1289, en Silkstone, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Heron, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Cristiana De NOTTON, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Lord John Le Neveu Darcy I antes de 1315, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 6 de septiembre de 1323, en Knaith, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
